THEUNDERSTUDY-IMPROVISE.title: Improvise
THEUNDERSTUDY-STEADY_HAND.title: Steady Hand
THEUNDERSTUDY-OVERFLOW.title: Overflow
THEUNDERSTUDY-OVERFLOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies equal to your [gold]Limited[/gold] + 1.
THEUNDERSTUDY-STAGE_FRIGHT.title: Stage Fright
THEUNDERSTUDY-OPEN_MIND.title: Open Mind
THEUNDERSTUDY-SPILLOVER.title: Spillover
THEUNDERSTUDY-SPILLOVER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply [gold]Weak[/gold] to all enemies equal to your [gold]Shaken[/gold] + 1.
THEUNDERSTUDY-CRAM_SESSION.title: Cram Session
THEUNDERSTUDY-QUICK_STUDY.title: Quick Study
THEUNDERSTUDY-CRITIQUE.title: Critique
THEUNDERSTUDY-CRITIQUE.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to target enemy equal to your [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] + 1.
THEUNDERSTUDY-REWRITE.title: Rewrite
THEUNDERSTUDY-REWRITE.description:
Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from up to {Cards:diff()} attacks and skills in your hand.
Gain 1 [gold]Limited[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-TOUCH_UP.title: Touch-Up
THEUNDERSTUDY-TOUCH_UP.description:
Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from {Cards:diff()} attack or skill in your hand.
Convert 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to [gold]Unvulnerable[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-HECKLE.title: Heckle
THEUNDERSTUDY-HECKLE.description:
Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from up to {Cards:diff()} attacks and skills in your hand.
Apply [gold]Weak[/gold] to target enemy equal to your [gold]Weak[/gold] + 1.
THEUNDERSTUDY-BENCHED.title: Benched
THEUNDERSTUDY-CHIP_ON_YOUR_SHOULDER.desc: Whenever a debuff is applied to you during your turn, gain {IfUpgraded:show:5|3} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNDERSTUDY_STRIKE.title: Strike
THEUNDERSTUDY-UNDERSTUDY_DEFEND.title: Defend
THEUNDERSTUDY-PERFORMANCE.title: Performance
THEUNDERSTUDY-PERFORMANCE.description:
Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to up to {Select:diff()} attacks and skills in your discard pile.
THEUNDERSTUDY-INTENTION.title: Intention
THEUNDERSTUDY-INTENTION.description: Apply [gold]Intense[/gold] to up to {Select:diff()} attacks and skills.
